name: Punch Champions
description: In BOXING HERO : PUNCH CHAMPIONS, fight 8 epic boxers in intense combats. Jab, cross, uppercut, use all possible tricks, give in all you have, but don’t forget to dodge or you'll be KO. Punch-out all opponents, and win the world belt in this superb arcade game.
instructions: In BOXING HERO PUNCH CHAMPIONS fight 8 epic boxers in intense combats Jab cross uppercut use all possible tricks give in all you have but don t forget to dodge or you ll be KO Punch-out all opponents and win the world belt in this superb arcade
